message:
fix(pager): prevent db_size reversion in WAL group commit (bd-3wop3.8)

BUG: After group commit returns, the caller was setting:
  inner.db_size = committed_db_size;

But `committed_db_size` was computed BEFORE the group commit. If the
flusher batched multiple transactions and set inner.db_size to a higher
value (e.g., 19), this line reverted it back to the caller's original
value (e.g., 17).

This caused BusySnapshot errors:
  "page 19 > snapshot db_size 17 (latest: 17)"

FIX: In WAL mode with group commit, don't overwrite inner.db_size - the
flusher already set the correct consolidated value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
